brands.name: Haldiram's
brands.desc: A unified WhatsApp operating system for Haldiram's retail ecosystem — retailer, field executive, and distributor journeys on a single number.

journeys.title: Retailer Activation & Onboarding
journeys.desc: Identify, invite and register new retail partners through targeted WhatsApp campaigns and automated verification flows — zero paper, zero salesman effort.

journeys.title: Campaigns & Product Queries
journeys.desc: Push festive and product campaigns to retailers and resolve scheme or product queries instantly using ZoAi — no sales rep needed at any step.

journeys.title: Order to Cash
journeys.desc: Self-service ordering via the WhatsApp catalog, AI-powered order capture from handwritten notes, and confirmed order dispatch — end-to-end on one channel.

journeys.title: DT Fulfillment & Payment
journeys.desc: Distributor order confirmation, AI-assisted invoice generation, UPI payment collection and outstanding ledger — the full fulfilment cycle on WhatsApp.

journeys.title: Field Ops & Expense Management
journeys.desc: Sales executive journey — from AI-powered clock-in to beat plan routing, customer check-ins, order capture, market intelligence, and one-tap expense claims.

journeys.title: Automated Payment Collection
journeys.desc: AI-driven promise-to-pay collection with dynamic UPI QR reminders, scheme unlocks for on-time payment, and salesman escalation when needed.

journeys.title: Turnover-Based Loyalty Scheme
journeys.desc: Retailer snaps or shares a distributor invoice on WhatsApp — ZoAi authenticates it, extracts SKUs, maps purchases to scheme progress, and unlocks rewards automatically.

journeys.title: Van Sales Journey
journeys.desc: Sales rep journey with Clock-in & Trip Stock entry, assigned beat routes & customer GPS check-ins, ordering quick actions, and Clock-out reconciliation report.
